word: G1579 - ἐκκολυμβάω - ekkolymbáō - ek-kol-oom-bah'-o - Swim out

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκκολυμβάω

- Transliteration: Ekkolumbao

- Phonetic: ek-kol-oom-bah'-o

- Definition:

1. to swim out of

- Origin: from G1537 and G2860

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G2860; to escape by swimming: - swim out.
